title: Apollon — DPIA Pre-Screen (Art. 35 GDPR)
description: Documents whether a full Data Protection Impact Assessment (Datenschutz-Folgenabschätzung) is required. The pre-screen uses the BayLfD "Muss-/Soll-Liste" for Bavarian public bodies and the DSK lists.
